---
title: "TermineR"
description: "R package for extracting information on endogenous proteolytic processing from shotgun proteomics data."
---

TermineR is an R package for extracting, annotating, and visualizing information on endogenous proteolytic processing from shotgun proteomics data.

The package provides adapter functions for common search engine outputs, peptide annotation against protein sequences, and downstream visualization and differential abundance workflows for proteolytic products.

## Highlights

- Adapter functions for FragPipe, DIA-NN, and Spectronaut search results.
- Annotation of peptide termini, cleavage sites, specificity, and processing information.
- Functions for visualizing cleavage-site sequence context.
- Connected to the 2024 *Proteomics* method paper.

## Links

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/MiguelCos/TermineR)
- [Publication DOI](https://doi.org/10.1002/pmic.202300491)

:::{.tags}
[`R`]{.tag} [`proteomics`]{.tag} [`terminomics`]{.tag} [`protease degradomics`]{.tag}
:::
